title: Company Profile

products.name: POP display
products.specs: retail components for all retail stores and supermarkets

contact.address: Jiashan, near to Shanghai and Ningbo Port

key_info: Leading manufacturer of POP display and retail components
Established in 2000
One-stop solutions for customers
More than 12 extrusion machines, 5 injection machines and 5 bending machines
Large quantity and fast delivery capability
Convenient transport and fast delivery location
raw_text: SHANGHE Company Profile JiaShan Shanghe Display is a leading manufacturer of POP display and retail components for all retail stores and supermarkets. We expertize in providing one-stop solutions for customers. JiaShan Shanghe Display established in 2000,who mainly do data strips,shelf pusher systems,POP display and other accessories for supermarkets and retail stores. We have more than 12 extrusion machines, 5 injection machines and 5 bending machines to meet request for large qty and fast delivery. We located in Jiashan,which near to Shanghai and Ningbo Port,with convenient transport and fast delivery. 01 02 03 04 05 Shanghe
